message.content:
The CRT/terminal glitch effect visibility is rated **2/10** (subtle, minimal visual noise).  

Orange/ember pixelated glyphs (e.g., the envelope, phone, location icons) are **clearly visible** and distinct against the dark background. Text (e.g., “EMAIL,” “PHONE,” “LOCATION,” and the email address) is **readable** with good contrast between light text and the dark contact section.
